title: Rule

effect.description: The outcome if this rule matches: 'permit' or 'deny'.

operations.description: List of operation names this rule applies to (e.g., 'read', 'export', 'write').

condition.description: Optional PolicyCondition expression that must be satisfied for this rule to fire.

description: A single permit-or-deny clause within a Policy, specifying the effect, the list of operations it applies to, and an optional PolicyCondition expression that must evaluate to true.
